subject: Fwd: IDSIP Jan Monthly Meeting - Direct sale part

content.answer:
Hi Ian and Christin

We had a meeting with Putri, Daniel, Dito and Id team this morning with
action items summarized in following email.

In short, we want to trail direct business in id to my muslin fashion
category, target to launch in mid Feb to catch the Raya peak

Loop Saovanee and Keljin as we will need MY rm and marketing resources
support!

Details are in attachment. Please let us know your suggestions to follow.

Thanks

*Wang Shuning*

Shopee | Cross Border - SG | BPM - BI - SIP

*Mobile:* +65 96310932

*Address:* Galaxy, 1 Fusionopolis


Hi Putri, Daniel, Dito and all,

Thanks for the discussion on piloting IDMY direct selling with 10-20 muslim
fashion sellers by late Feb to catch MY's Raya peak period. Summary of next
steps in the table below.

Could you please assign a PIC each from below teams for us to take from
here?

   - *ID SMT/ local RM team* (for seller interest testing, and pilot seller
   support)
   - *ID SPX team* (for FM rate card, and any logistics integration with CB
   shipping channel)
   - *ID legal/tax team* (to clear any export related legal/tax requirement)

[image: image.png]

[image: image.png]

Thank you very much.
Cuiwei

content.answer:
Seller can login in MY seller center to set up and do LS.

Actually, talked to ID RMs, sellers mainly need to rely on themselves at
the initial stage, there is no feature support free samples from ID sellers
to MY affiliates, although SIP can support offline free samples shipping,
it is not scalable until system ready.

ID team is quite ok on this.

content.question: move 2.7K sellers who cover 50% of ID MY ado to direct
launch the direct sales from ID to PH and SG
pitch top 50 sellers in each L2 category about direct sales
launch ID glocal SC, then discuss if we want to open the direct biz to

content.answer:
Hi Ian

Aligned with ID team, among the 100 sellers in the pitch list:
Target 50 sellers agree to join after this week's pitch, at the end can
launch 25 sellers.

This is to benchmark MY SG direct success rate:
~60% pitching success rate, and falled back to 20-30% at final launch (drop
due to ops/payment/system complexities).

Shuning
